The **[open water swimming](/wiki/Open_water_swimming "Open water swimming")** portion of the **2011 World Aquatics Championships** was held between July 19–23 in [Shanghai, China](/wiki/Shanghai "Shanghai") at the [Jinshan City Beach](/wiki/Jinshan_District "Jinshan District").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Events

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Events")]

The following events were contested by both men and women in Shanghai:

* 5 km
* 10 km
* 25 km

In addition, there was a team competition with male and female competitors.
